title: Just Enough Crafting Tree
description: JECT adds a customizable crafting tree that shows all required recipes for any item from any mods.
body:
# Just Enough Crafting Tree

__**v2.0.0 is the latest version and the best one so far.**__

Just Enough Crafting Tree lets you open the full crafting tree of any item, inspect every dependency, and track the useful steps directly from your inventory while crafting.

![Full crafting tree](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1612/253/image_2026-04-03_145922610-png.png)

## Features

*   Open the full recursive crafting tree of any item
*   See exact quantities for every dependency
*   Support for machine recipes and modded crafting chains
*   Expand branches step by step or much faster for huge crafts
*   View total required resources for the selected craft
*   Mark sub-steps as done
*   Track any craft directly in the inventory
*   Follow only the currently useful step instead of reading the whole tree
*   Open multiple tracked crafts at the same time
*   Minimize, move, reorder, and restore tracked craft windows
*   Reopen the matching tree step from the inventory with the `T` button
*   Persistent inventory tracking windows between sessions

## Inventory Tracking

Tracked crafts appear as compact windows in the inventory so you can keep working without constantly reopening the full tree.

Each window shows:

*   the current target step
*   what it is used for
*   the required machine
*   the direct ingredients
*   the output per craft when relevant

![Inventory tracking windows](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1612/259/image_2026-04-03_150054609-png.png) ![1 to 3](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1612/273/image_2026-04-03_151139978-png.png)

## Recipe Screen Integration

From supported recipe screens, you can jump straight into the crafting tree for the displayed recipe.

![Recipe screen integration](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1612/267/image_2026-04-03_150921707-png.png)

## Why Use It

This mod is made for players dealing with long crafting chains, large factories, heavy tech mods, or simply complex progression.

Instead of guessing what to do next, you always know:

*   what is missing
*   what is already done
*   what machine is needed
*   which step should be crafted right now

![Large advanced tree example](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1612/264/image_2026-04-03_150605274-png.png)
